$comment: Allowlist of intentional sync-over-async (.GetAwaiter().GetResult()) call-sites. Category A = host requires synchronous entry-point; Category B = avoidable (never listed here); Category C = lint false-positive (e.g. inside a doc comment). Entries are identified semantically by file + pattern + method, NOT by line number — line numbers drift and the linter reports the accurate current line at scan time. Review entries when they expire; if the host constraint still exists, renew the date.

Wave 16C Path-2 bridge: callers are Lidarr UI action handlers (sync entry-points). Task.Run decouples from SynchronizationContext to prevent SemaphoreSlim deadlock.

Wave 16C Path-2 bridge: EnumerateAll uses Task.Run to escape sync context before running async enumeration. Same root cause.

RecordAuthFailure is a synchronous circuit-breaker method on the auth-failure observation path; the awaited IAuthFailureHandler.HandleFailureAsync completes synchronously (ValueTask.CompletedTask in the bridge-default), so no real blocking occurs. Mirrors Common AuthFailureGate's category-A sync bridge.
Same constraint as LlmAuthCircuit.RecordAuthFailure(): synchronous circuit-breaker method; awaited HandleSuccessAsync completes synchronously.
